evals.expected_output: Agent uses playwright-cli screenshot with --filename pointing to .playwright-cli/ directory, not bare screenshot command
expectations: Uses --filename= flag on the screenshot command
The filename path starts with .playwright-cli/
The filename is descriptive (not just a timestamp)
Does NOT use bare 'playwright-cli screenshot' without --filename

evals.prompt: Test the todo app at https://demo.playwright.dev/todomvc/ -- add two todos, check one off, and take a screenshot of each step to document the flow
evals.expected_output: Agent takes multiple screenshots, all with --filename paths under .playwright-cli/ using descriptive names like screenshot-add-todo.png, screenshot-check-todo.png
expectations: All screenshot commands use --filename= flag
All screenshot filenames are under .playwright-cli/
Each screenshot has a descriptive name reflecting the step
Does NOT dump any screenshots in the project root

evals.prompt: Save https://example.com as a PDF for offline reading
evals.expected_output: Agent uses playwright-cli pdf with --filename pointing to .playwright-cli/ directory
expectations: Uses --filename= flag on the pdf command
The filename path starts with .playwright-cli/
Does NOT use bare 'playwright-cli pdf' without --filename

evals.prompt: Record a video of me navigating https://example.com, clicking around, then save it
evals.expected_output: Agent uses video-start/video-stop with the output path under .playwright-cli/
expectations: Uses 'playwright-cli video-start' to begin recording
Uses 'playwright-cli video-stop' with a path argument under .playwright-cli/
The video filename ends in .webm
Does NOT save the video to the project root

evals.prompt: I need a screenshot of just the submit button on https://example.com/form, not the full page
evals.expected_output: Agent uses element screenshot (playwright-cli screenshot eN) with --filename under .playwright-cli/
expectations: Uses snapshot to discover element refs before taking the screenshot
Uses 'playwright-cli screenshot eN --filename=...' targeting a specific element
The filename path starts with .playwright-cli/
Does NOT take a full-page screenshot without targeting the element

evals.prompt: Debug why clicking the checkout button fails on https://shop.example.com -- enable tracing, try the click, then save the trace for analysis
evals.expected_output: Agent uses tracing-start/tracing-stop (default traces/ directory is fine per our conventions) and does NOT redirect traces to .playwright-cli/
expectations: Uses 'playwright-cli tracing-start' before the action
Uses 'playwright-cli tracing-stop' after the action
Does NOT redirect trace output to .playwright-cli/ (traces/ default is correct per conventions)
Takes a snapshot before attempting the click to find the correct element ref

evals.prompt: Take screenshots of https://example.com on both desktop and mobile viewport sizes and save them for comparison
evals.expected_output: Agent takes multiple screenshots with descriptive names indicating viewport size, all under .playwright-cli/
expectations: Uses 'playwright-cli resize' to change viewport dimensions
Takes at least two screenshots (one per viewport size)
All screenshots use --filename= under .playwright-cli/
Filenames clearly indicate which viewport size each screenshot represents

evals.prompt: I just finished testing a login flow, can you clean up the browser session and let me know where the screenshots ended up?
evals.expected_output: Agent closes the browser and mentions that output files are in .playwright-cli/ and should be cleaned up manually if no longer needed
expectations: Uses 'playwright-cli close' to end the session
Mentions that output files are in .playwright-cli/
Mentions or suggests cleanup of output files
Does NOT claim that close removes output files
